blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: It's ten minutes. Shot mostly around campus but I used some footage I took before I left. The field behind our block.
He turned his mug around in his hands.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: The gap between where you are and where you want to be. And how sometimes the gap itself is the thing.
She smiled at her mug. He watched it happen.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Let me figure out if it's actually good first. Then you can see it.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I think you'd be honest. Which in this case might be the same thing.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I want to talk about what I said. On the phone. In October.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: About being scared of naming it.
He nodded. Set his mug down.
